select.if: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql001 */ ALERT_ID AS alertId, TO_CHAR(MAX(ALERT_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD') AS alertDate FROM MEDIATE_USER_ALERT GROUP BY ALERT_ID
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql001 */ ALERT_ID AS alertId, TO_CHAR(ALERT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS alertDate FROM MEDIATE_USER_ALERT WHERE USER_ID = #{req.userId}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql002 */ DISTINCT A.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE AS YEAR_MONTH, A.USER_ID AS USER_ID, A.COR_TITLE AS TITLE FROM ( SELECT MU.USER_ID, MU.BROKER_ID, CC.COR_LEC_ID, CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE, CC.COR_TITLE FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION CC CROSS JOIN TB_MED_USERS MU WHERE MU.PRIV_ID IN ('3','4','5','6','7','8','9') AND CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, -60), 'YYYYMM') AND CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMM') AND CC.COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' ) A LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION B ON A.COR_LEC_ID = B.COR_LEC_ID AND A.USER_ID = B.COR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV C ON A.USER_ID = C.COR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK D ON A.BROKER_ID = D.COR_BROKER_CODE WHERE ( B.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG IN ('2', '3') OR B.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG IS NULL ) AND C.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL AND D.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql002 */ DISTINCT A.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE AS YEAR_MONTH , A.USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.COR_TITLE AS TITLE FROM ( SELECT MU.USER_ID , MU.BROKER_ID , CC.COR_LEC_ID , CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE , CC.COR_TITLE FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION CC CROSS JOIN TB_MED_USERS MU INNER JOIN ( SELECT BROKER_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{req.userId} UNION SELECT BROKER_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS_PRIV WHERE USER_ID = #{req.userId} ) E ON MU.BROKER_ID = E.BROKER_ID WHERE MU.PRIV_ID IN ('3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9') AND CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, -60), 'YYYYMM') AND CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMM') AND CC.COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' ) A LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION B ON A.COR_LEC_ID = B.COR_LEC_ID AND A.USER_ID = B.COR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV C ON A.USER_ID = C.COR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK D ON A.BROKER_ID = D.COR_BROKER_CODE WHERE ( B.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG IN ('2', '3') OR B.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG IS NULL ) AND C.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL AND D.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql002 */ DISTINCT A.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE AS YEAR_MONTH , A.USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.COR_TITLE AS TITLE FROM ( SELECT MU.USER_ID , MU.BROKER_ID , CC.COR_LEC_ID , CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE , CC.COR_TITLE FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION CC CROSS JOIN TB_MED_USERS MU INNER JOIN ( SELECT BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{req.userId} UNION SELECT BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS_PRIV WHERE USER_ID = #{req.userId} ) F ON MU.BROKER_ID = F.BROKER_ID AND MU.SUB_BROKER_ID = F.SUB_BROKER_ID WHERE MU.PRIV_ID IN ('3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9') AND CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, -60), 'YYYYMM') AND CC.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMM') AND CC.COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' ) A LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION B ON A.COR_LEC_ID = B.COR_LEC_ID AND A.USER_ID = B.COR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV C ON A.USER_ID = C.COR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK D ON A.BROKER_ID = D.COR_BROKER_CODE WHERE ( B.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG IN ('2', '3') OR B.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG IS NULL ) AND C.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL AND D.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql003 */ DISTINCT M.COR_BROKER_CODE AS BROKER_CODE, SCI.COR_ENFORCE_DATE AS REGISTER_DATE FROM COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM SCI INNER JOIN COR_SELF_CHECK_BROKER_ANS SCBA ON SCI.BROKER_DIVISION = SCBA.BROKER_DIVISION AND SCBA.BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SC.COR_ENFORCE_DATE, SC.COR_BROKER_CODE, CC.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID, CC.COR_ANSWER_REASON, CC.COR_ANSWER_RESULT FROM COR_SELF_CHECK SC INNER JOIN COR_SELF_CHECK_CONFIRMATION CC ON SC.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID = CC.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID AND SC.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} ) M ON SCI.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID = M.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID WHERE ( (SCI.REASON_REQUIRED_FLG = '1' AND M.COR_ANSWER_REASON IS NULL) OR (M.COR_ANSWER_RESULT = '0' AND M.COR_ANSWER_REASON IS NULL) OR M.COR_ENFORCE_DATE IS NULL ) AND SCI.COR_ENFORCE_DATE > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, - 60), 'YYYYMM') AND SCI.COR_ENFORCE_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMM') AND SCI.COR_INDICATION_FLG = '1'

mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql004 */ T9N_INFO_CAT categoryId, T9N_NAME categoryName, T9N_REQUIRED_FLG requiredFlag FROM PSITE_T9N_INFO_CAT WHERE T9N_DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY T9N_SORT
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-01#Sql007 */ FILE_DIR fileDirectory FROM TB_MED_TEMP_FILE_DIR WHERE CAT_ID = #{req.categoryId} AND FUNC_ID = #{req.functionId}
